calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-13-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-13-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Janet Pond.
Robert Sellards, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bernardino Santana and Dolores Santana.
Plaintiff's Witness: Doroles Santana, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendants: Michael Thorn adn Jennifer Toth aka Jennifer Thorn.
Exhibit-1 Rental Agreement-----------ID/EVID.
Exhibit-2 Three-day Notice-----------ID/EVID.
Exhibit-3 Proof of Service-----------ID/EVID..
Exhibit-4 Proof of Service Prejudgment Claims of Right----------ID/EVID.
Exhibit-5 Proof of Service Prejudgment Claims of Right----------ID/EVID.
Exhibit-6 Proof of Service Prejudgment Claims of Right----------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Past-due Rent $5,417.00
Holdover Damages $4,454.00
Costs $277.00, for a total of $10,148.00
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated to the return of the exhibits in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Comm. Sue Kaplan Dept.: 218 Clerk: Anna Redigonda

Matter comes on calendar for Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
Robert Sellards, Esq. appearing for Plaintiffs, present
No appearance by either Defendants Michael Thorn and/or Jennifer Toth

Settlement Conference is ordered off calendar. No appearance by Defendants. Trial Date remains.
(not reported)
